reported_error: Uncaught TypeError: can't access property "x", b is null at rainLerpPointV225 -> clipRainSegmentPartialV225 -> drawWorldRainParticlesV222
root_cause: clipRainSegmentPartialV225 could pass a null projected endpoint to rainLerpPointV225 when a rain sample was outside/behind the camera and projectRainPointV222 returned null.
changes: clipRainSegmentPartialV225 now rejects invalid endpoint pairs instead of interpolating null.
drawWorldRainParticlesV222 now skips invalid segments after clipping/clamping.
clampRainSegmentPixelLengthV224 now safely handles invalid endpoints.
Added V225B debug counters for invalid endpoint rejection.
preserved: V225 wall-span clipping and airspace rain logic
V224 distance LOD, frustum refill and motion compensation
next_validation: Reproduce the V225 crash location; confirm no TypeError in console.
Test rain near hedge walls, yoga canopy looking outward, corridor between hedges, and fast movement/rotation.
If no crash, continue visual assessment of wall-span rain behavior.
